display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: In Shropshire a Great Western Railway 'Modified Hall' steam engine and its tender is being taken out of service as it needs a safety inspection.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A cherished wartime iron workhorse needs to be hauled 160 miles from the Churnet Valley Railway in Staffordshire to a winter extravaganza in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The A4 LNER Pacific Locomotive Sir Nigel Gresley must be hauled 46 miles at 30mph from Crewe to Bridgnorth.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Royal Highland Fusilier, a 100-ton Deltic diesel engine, must be hauled from Leicestershire to Wirksworth in Cheshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: In Shropshire a Great Western Railway 'Modified Hall' steam engine and its tender is being taken out of service as it needs a safety inspection.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A cherished wartime iron workhorse needs to be hauled 160 miles from the Churnet Valley Railway in Staffordshire to a winter extravaganza in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The A4 LNER Pacific Locomotive Sir Nigel Gresley must be hauled 46 miles at 30mph from Crewe to Bridgnorth.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Royal Highland Fusilier, a 100-ton Deltic diesel engine, must be hauled from Leicestershire to Wirksworth in Cheshire.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The bespectacled duo from 1978 with some classic turns including Dr Spooner in the Bookshop, and the continuing saga of Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy with Corbett and Barker from 1977 with superb sketches including An Appeal on Behalf of the Indecisive.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More vintage levity from Barker and Corbett. The sketches include That's What I Said, Beans With Everything, Infidelity Not Quite Cricket, and Saturday Night Fervour.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: It's a Duck! sketch. More classic comedy and cheeky musical numbers from the much-missed masters of mirth, Ronnies Corbett and Barker.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Another burst of bifocal comedy with the much-missed duo of Messrs Barker and Corbett. This time, the sketches include Coke Up, Sid and Lil, Bear Facts and a musical finale.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The bespectacled duo from 1978 with some classic turns including Dr Spooner in the Bookshop, and the continuing saga of Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy with Corbett and Barker from 1977 with superb sketches including An Appeal on Behalf of the Indecisive.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More vintage levity from Barker and Corbett. The sketches include That's What I Said, Beans With Everything, Infidelity Not Quite Cricket, and Saturday Night Fervour.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: It's a Duck! sketch. More classic comedy and cheeky musical numbers from the much-missed masters of mirth, Ronnies Corbett and Barker.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Another burst of bifocal comedy with the much-missed duo of Messrs Barker and Corbett. This time, the sketches include Coke Up, Sid and Lil, Bear Facts and a musical finale.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The bespectacled duo from 1978 with some classic turns including Dr Spooner in the Bookshop, and the continuing saga of Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic comedy with Corbett and Barker from 1977 with superb sketches including An Appeal on Behalf of the Indecisive.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More vintage levity from Barker and Corbett. The sketches include That's What I Said, Beans With Everything, Infidelity Not Quite Cricket, and Saturday Night Fervour.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Blind adventurer Amar Latif takes us along one of Yorkshire's most stunning river valleys as he abseils into a hidden gorge and meets some local llamas.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Darren treat a woman who is suffering from terminal cancer, and Jamie and Jason see a familiar face when they are called to the home of his elderly grandfather.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Sam and Tony are called to a woman suffering excruciating stomach pain, but soon find themselves dealing with a sudden seizure. Stef and Lee treat an excitable six-year-old.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Time is against ambulance crew mates Laura and Jason as they treat a 74-year-old woman who is having a stroke. Olly and V are called to a man whose heart is beating dangerously fast.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: V and Ollie are faced with a dilemma when they're called to woman who has suffered a seizure but refuses to go to hospital. Rachel and Mick are called to assist the police with a prisoner.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Darren treat a woman who is suffering from terminal cancer, and Jamie and Jason see a familiar face when they are called to the home of his elderly grandfather.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Sam and Tony are called to a woman suffering excruciating stomach pain, but soon find themselves dealing with a sudden seizure. Stef and Lee treat an excitable six-year-old.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Time is against ambulance crew mates Laura and Jason as they treat a 74-year-old woman who is having a stroke. Olly and V are called to a man whose heart is beating dangerously fast.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: V and Ollie are faced with a dilemma when they're called to woman who has suffered a seizure but refuses to go to hospital. Rachel and Mick are called to assist the police with a prisoner.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Crystal Skulls: Did the ancients possess the knowledge and ability to create, and cut seemingly complex crystal skulls or do they have extra-terrestrial origins.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Great Pyramid at Giza in Egypt is a wonder of the World. But when was it built, for what purpose and by who.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Nazi Belief in the Occult: It was believed that part of the Nazi party was involved and influenced in all manner of occult beliefs from their uniforms to their huge rallies.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water.

programme.title: Charles I: To Kill a King
programme.desc: Charles I is visited by the Earl of Denbigh, seeking to broker terms between him and parliament. When his visit is rejected, new legislation is drawn up to try the king for treason.

programme.title: Charles I: To Kill a King
programme.desc: The country prepares for the unprecedented trial of the king, which sees Charles I and the Lord President John Bradshaw become embroiled in a battle of wills.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed psychic Kristina Frye joins the team to help investigate the murder of the leader of an organisation dedicated to eradicating human trafficking.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are on the hunt after a prison van crash frees convicted killer Danny Winters. After tracking the fugitive, Charlie and Rex find themselves held hostage.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie uncovers a web of police corruption when she attempts to clear the name of Al's former NYPD mentor, who is gunned down in an ambush.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After decomposing bodies are found in a field, Murdoch fears a sequential killer targeting men from other cultures.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the death of a factory worker leading a strike, Murdoch suspects plans to unionise may have motivated his killer.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed psychic Kristina Frye joins the team to help investigate the murder of the leader of an organisation dedicated to eradicating human trafficking.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are on the hunt after a prison van crash frees convicted killer Danny Winters. After tracking the fugitive, Charlie and Rex find themselves held hostage.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie uncovers a web of police corruption when she attempts to clear the name of Al's former NYPD mentor, who is gunned down in an ambush.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack's romance with Anna blossoms whilst he and the rest of the team investigate the mysterious death of a cyclist during a race.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Brenda finds love at the home of a clock collector, but when the heir to the house is found dead, Father Brown investigates the case.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are on the hunt after a prison van crash frees convicted killer Danny Winters. After tracking the fugitive, Charlie and Rex find themselves held hostage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After decomposing bodies are found in a field, Murdoch fears a sequential killer targeting men from other cultures.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the death of a factory worker leading a strike, Murdoch suspects plans to unionise may have motivated his killer.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Men Who Sold the World: Murdoch and Ogden celebrate their wedding anniversary in London, but their trip is disrupted by the death of a fellow guest at an English inn.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch, Ogden and Susannah are almost killed when a bomb destroys a shop. The body of a suffragette is discovered in the rubble, but Murdoch doesn't believe she's responsible.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mallory is forced to turn to the sleuthing priest for help when a senior member of the police force is murdered at a bowls match.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Kristina Frye makes a televised appeal to Red John, bringing back dark memories for Patrick - who is forced to protect his rival from the ruthless serial killer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a seemingly ancient body is discovered in Newfoundland's tundra, Charlie and Rex head into the wilderness in search of a reclusive survivalist community.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. An heiress's mysterious death exposes a PR agent's ruthless ambition. Carrie gains a new insight into the identity of her sister's killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. The team is introduced to the world of rock and roll when the singer of a band is murdered.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Men Who Sold the World: Murdoch and Ogden celebrate their wedding anniversary in London, but their trip is disrupted by the death of a fellow guest at an English inn.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch, Ogden and Susannah are almost killed when a bomb destroys a shop. The body of a suffragette is discovered in the rubble, but Murdoch doesn't believe she's responsible.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Kristina Frye makes a televised appeal to Red John, bringing back dark memories for Patrick - who is forced to protect his rival from the ruthless serial killer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a seemingly ancient body is discovered in Newfoundland's tundra, Charlie and Rex head into the wilderness in search of a reclusive survivalist community.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mallory is forced to turn to the sleuthing priest for help when a senior member of the police force is murdered at a bowls match.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. An heiress's mysterious death exposes a PR agent's ruthless ambition. Carrie gains a new insight into the identity of her sister's killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. The team is introduced to the world of rock and roll when the singer of a band is murdered.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack faces a life-changing decision while investigating the murder of a man found dead in a boat off the Saint Marie coast.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Rock 'n' roll reaches Kembleford when a group of bikers causes outrage and excitement in equal measure.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Bailey gets a new role; a ride-along with Nolan goes awry; the team looks to recruit new members. S8 E13

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: The team hunts for Amanda Weiss, a killer dubbed "The Masseuse," who became famous for breaking the necks of her massage clients; she has kidnapped a woman. S2 E4

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A team swap has existing alliances tested. Who will stay loyal? And who will flip a switch and change tack.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team must investigate one of their own when Langston is accused by a former colleague of being part of the Dr. Jekyll murders. S10 E22

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Women On The Verge
programme.desc: After a potential work promotion, a family christening and a messy love triangle collide disastrously, Laura decides it’s time to take action to stop herself from completely unravelling. S1 E1

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The farmstays are underway, but the first Farm Farewell is looming. After a double date with two of their ladies, each farmer must decide who will be going home.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris is on the case.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Richie romances Abigail. Remi and Eden’s recording takes over. Alf is fed up.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A team swap has existing alliances tested. Who will stay loyal? And who will flip a switch and change tack.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart leads his Little League team to the championship game. Meanwhile, a department store owner hires Homer as a salesman. S18 E18

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny finally gets an acting role! But Leonard and Penny's relationship is thrown into jeopardy when he hesitates to answer a very important question. S7 E12

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Will Alf accept help from his friends?Tane’s loved ones cling to hope. Sonny’s feeling sidelined. David wishes he did better.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Selina searches for answers.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A major power shift rocks the game, as Georgia makes a bold play for a woman to take the win. But does she have the numbers for her plan to succeed?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: It’s dog-eat-underdog as strategies shift and fortunes flip in the forest, before a dramatic twist turns the game on its head, putting even the strongest players in peril...

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A major power shift rocks the game, as Georgia makes a bold play for a woman to take the win. But does she have the numbers for her plan to succeed?

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Season Finale: The CSIs' lives are on the line as they close in on the elusive Dr. Jekyll, and more than one member of the team may not live to see his capture. S10 E23

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Women On The Verge
programme.desc: Laura feels elated after her first therapy session with the enigmatic Dr. Fitzgerald and feels back in control of her life however during a work assignment she gets emotionally over involved. S1 E2

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: It’s the annual Farmer Wants a Wife country ball full of romance and fun.But not everyone is happy as the quest for love threatens to tear one farm apart.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Selina searches for answers.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Will Alf accept help from his friends?Tane’s loved ones cling to hope. Sonny’s feeling sidelined. David wishes he did better.

programme.title: 1News Special: You, Me & Aussie
programme.desc: You, Me & Aussie hosted by journalist Jack Tame dives into the real stories of Kiwis living in Australia—the highs, the lows, and everything in between.

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: The official unveiling of the new Tournament football hits trouble when an online conspiracist makes incendiary claims about the dangers of the ball’s advanced new technology. S1 E5

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee are joined by Rhod Gilbert, Carol Vorderman, Hal Cruttenden and Kelly Hoppen.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris is on the case.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: A confronting case for Nhi and Carlos as they are called to a woman running in front of traffic. Dan helps a star footballer at training. New dad Bill races to a baby in trouble.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa with WWF
programme.desc: Pax Assadi and conservationist Nicola Toki go on an epic journey to Pureora rainforest, where they will learn about our most vulnerable, controversial critters facing extinction today. S1 E2

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Te Karere

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: 1News Special: You, Me & Aussie
programme.desc: You, Me & Aussie hosted by journalist Jack Tame dives into the real stories of Kiwis living in Australia—the highs, the lows, and everything in between.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Two photos, one traveller and lot of discrepancies put Immigration on high alert. A beer making kit from the US has Customs on the hop and Biosecurity inspects some mystery critters at their benches.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A driver with a car full of empty booze cans says the crash was not his fault. A disqualified biker fails to stop for police and goes underground in the suburbs.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. Niall is conflicted when asked by his mother to lie in court about Ruben’s violence. Ruben seems to have changed for the better, so the decision weighs heavily on him. S1 E3

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Selina searches for answers.

programme.title: George Clarke's Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Rollo and Olivia have decided to swap city life for the rolling Chiltern Hills, snapping up an old barber's shop and its 17th-century attached building; they plan to convert the loft.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Dennis and Karen have long dreamed of living in the wilderness and in 2013 they finally bought their perfect bush block in Clarence, a tiny pocket of the spectacular Blue Mountains, west of Sydney.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The first day of the Somme Offensive was the blackest day in the British Army's history. The shocking numbers are revealed as the war retrospective revisits 1916.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Fighting Back by Sea and Air: Britain needed to produce vast amounts of ammunition. Chatham Docks on the Medway saw 142 ships set sail, and bomber bases sprung up across the country.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Hertford College, Oxford, where the items brought in by the public include a unique recording of a Beatles studio session.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Dumfries House in Ayrshire, where Prince Charles talks of the campaign he headed to prevent the sale of the home's furniture.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The first day of the Somme Offensive was the blackest day in the British Army's history. The shocking numbers are revealed as the war retrospective revisits 1916.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Fighting Back by Sea and Air: Britain needed to produce vast amounts of ammunition. Chatham Docks on the Medway saw 142 ships set sail, and bomber bases sprung up across the country.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: David Attenborough introduces the wildlife of Asia's mountains, from elephants living in high altitude tea plantations, to gathering of swifts in Thailand's caves.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: How animals survive when the northern half of Asia is transformed by snow and ice each year. Featuring footage of Himalayan wolves and the red-crowned crane.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Queensland from Kuranda to Townsville, learning to harvest sugar cane and hearing how locals withstand tropical storms.

programme.title: Great Australian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels along the eastern coast of Australia from the coal mines of Newcastle, New South Wales, to Brisbane.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at life on each continent, revealing how each distinct land mass has shaped the creatures found there, beginning with Antarctica.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at life in Asia, with footage of walruses gathering in huge numbers in the frozen north and brown bears roaming around remote Russian volcanoes.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want an 'Eastern Bloc' car to see whether the old Skoda jokes were deserved. Bidding low they win an orange Estelle, but how can they add any value to it.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Northamptonshire and Coventry, where Henry discovers a rare limited edition Honda Goldwing motorbike with only 65 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: The Ocean Pride targets shipwrecks off of Cornwall in pursuit of pollack, and the Margaret of Ladram hunts for lucrative Dover sole in the English Channel.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines Agatha's mysterious disappearance in December 1926 and reveals the influence this episode had on her writing.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines the author's later life and discovers how personal happiness ushered in a golden age for her writing.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Bangers team can't believe their luck when a 1970s family-favourite, a Volvo 144, rolls through Mathewson with just 15,000 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team fall for a Subaru Pick-up, which has all the Mathewsons in agreement. But will it all come crashing down when picking up parts proves tricky.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Great War, with statistics helping to shed new light on the horrendous conflict. Hear about the effect of World War I on the domestic front.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Rob Bell looks at how the greatest invasion in human history was being prepared in Southern England and the buildings that helped with D-Day and Operation Overlord.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington, East Yorkshire, where items of interest include a valuable ceramic bathing beauty.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values items in Belfast at the former drawing offices of Harland and Wolff, where the idea for the Titanic was first conceived.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Great War, with statistics helping to shed new light on the horrendous conflict. Hear about the effect of World War I on the domestic front.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Rob Bell looks at how the greatest invasion in human history was being prepared in Southern England and the buildings that helped with D-Day and Operation Overlord.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates footage of the wildlife of Asia's forests, including Bengal tigers, greater one-horned rhinos, purple frogs and orangutans.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: Footage of animals in Asia that live at extremely close quarters with people, from tigers making a home in town to elephants stopping traffic for food.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Thunderbird / Citroen SM / Punto / BMW: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave admires a two-decade-old Punto with just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: It's a battle of little and large as the team get creative with a 1996 Fiat 126 and then run their own consumer test on a 2004 Bentley Continental GT.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at life in South America, featuring footage of pumas, Andean bears, poison dart frogs, anacondas and swifts.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the wildlife of Australia, with footage of kangaroos and wombats braving snowstorms, and reptiles drinking through their skin in the desert.
